name: 2048 Premium
description: Experience the ultimate edition of the classic 2048 puzzle game! Join numbers to reach the 2048 tile and beyond. This premium version features sleek visuals, smooth animations, and multiple difficulty modes including standard 4x4, advanced 5x5, and expert 6x6 grids. Stuck? Use exclusive power-ups like Undo, Swap, and Delete to master the board. Perfect for quick brain training or long strategy sessions. Fully optimized for both desktop and mobile play
instructions: Desktop Use your Arrow Keys to move the tiles Mobile Simply Swipe across the screen to move tiles Objective When two tiles with the same number touch they merge into one Reach the 2048 tile to win Power-ups Use the buttons below the board to Undo
